From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)

Look up ***[Stalino](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Stalino "wiktionary:Stalino")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

**[Stalino](/wiki/Stalino "Stalino")** is a former name of Donetsk, [Ukraine](/wiki/Ukraine "Ukraine").

**Stalino** may also refer to:

* [Murgap, Turkmenistan](/wiki/Murgap,_Turkmenistan "Murgap, Turkmenistan"), formerly Stalino
* Stalino, a horse, [Irish Triple Crown race winner](/wiki/Irish_Triple_Crown_race_winners "Irish Triple Crown race winners") of 1945
